title: Persistence Mechanism Established (Linux)
description: Detects Linux persistence via cron, systemd units, rc.local or authorized_keys modification.
author: SOC Team
aql: SELECT sourceip, username, QIDNAME(qid) AS EventName FROM events WHERE LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) ILIKE '%LinuxServer%' AND (UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%/etc/cron%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%authorized_keys%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%/etc/systemd/system%') ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 5 MINUTES
